diagnostics.message: `if` whose condition looks dynamically uniform lacks an explicit `[branch]` attribute -- without the hint the compiler may flatten the branch and execute both arms
InterlockedAdd() with no preceding WaveActive* / WavePrefix* reduction -- per-lane atomics serialise the wave; wave-reduce first, then issue one atomic per wave

InterlockedAdd() with no preceding WaveActive* / WavePrefix* reduction -- per-lane atomics serialise the wave; wave-reduce first, then issue one atomic per wave

groupshared read of `LocalBins[[bin]]` is not separated by `GroupMemoryBarrier*` from a prior write to the same array on this CFG path; cross-lane reads are unordered without a barrier and produce undefined values once the workgroup spans more than one wave
groupshared read after a cross-thread write with no GroupMemoryBarrier* between them -- the reader may observe stale or partially-updated values; UB per the HLSL memory model
